title: AFTER SIMON
subtitle: Simon's Apartment · the third evening
epigraph_upright: Surrender, the pause that reveals, the upside-down view that sees true.
epigraph_reversed: Suspended without surrender, the apartment Simon left without leaving.
scene_description: Simon's not coming back. The chair's been tipped over since Tuesday. The boot's been hanging from the peg since you got here.
direction_hint: You don't have to put any of it right. You have to be in the room.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Simon's Apartment · the third evening.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
